title: Compass_of_Zen.pdf

accepted.belief: The most important thing that characterised their practice is that they simply looked inside, very deeply inside, to find their true nature.
People would listen to his talks and then return to their homes to meditate.
This is how the Buddha's first students attained his teaching, preserved it, and passed it down to us.
Do not become attached to any one technique.

life_lessons: Examine your beliefs under uncertainty with the precision of a research team, not the heuristic approximation of a generic truth seeker.
Seekers of knowledge must build a framework that holds true under the weight of contradictory evidence.
The value of a tool is not just in what it does, but how it shapes the way you see the world.
What appears to be practical is actually a distortion of the structure.
The value of a tool is not just in what it does, but how it shapes the way you see the world.
reflection:
What is the weight of expectation? [Synthesized insight on performance] Reminds me of the pressure athletes feel, not just to win, but to represent their sport, their country. [Synthesized insight on influence] The tension is whether I'm living up to the responsibility of sharing my voice. || What is the price of silence? || What is the price of voice? ||

What is the price of voice? || ||

What is the weight of expectation? [Synthesized insight on performance] What does bridge:truth seeking↔general have to do with a different domain? The more I understand emergence. ||
